tasks.desc: Added Recently Visited section: localStorage tracking of last 8 visited islands, horizontal scrollable row of 4 compact cards with thumbnails. Pure frontend, no backend changes.

tasks.desc: Achievements/badges system with 16 unlockable milestones, SQLite persistence, stat tracking hooks

tasks.desc: Daily quests system with 3 random quests per day, coin rewards, progress tracking hooks, frontend panel

Quests reset at midnight UTC.

tasks.desc: In-app notification center: bell icon with unread badge, notifications for guestbook/favorite/visit events, mark-as-read, 30s polling

tasks.desc: Random Island Events: 8 event types with coin rewards, animated banner UI

Also: security cleanup removing tracked binaries and hardcoded PII.

tasks.desc: Notification bell + dropdown panel on island page

summary: Added notification bell to island page topbar: CSS (.notif-bell-wrap/panel/badge/item), HTML bell button with dropdown panel in topbar before ⋯ menu, JS notification system (fetchNotifications polling every 30s, renderNotifList with type icons, markAllNotifRead, toggleNotifPanel with outside-click dismiss, auth-aware show/hide). Bell hidden for visitors, shows unread count badge. Clicking notifications for other islands navigates there. Responsive mobile support.

tasks.desc: Enhanced weather visual effects for all 5 types

summary: All 5 weather types now have visual particle effects: starry (50 twinkling stars with cross-sparkle on bright ones, 3 shooting stars with gradient trails, aurora color band with wavy sine-based shape), sunny (8 warm light rays from upper-right with golden gradients, 25 floating dust motes/pollen particles, golden lens flare with secondary flare), rainy (added 12 splash ripples as expanding ellipses on ground level in bottom 30%). Removed early return that skipped sunny/starry. All effects use seed-based deterministic pseudo-random, intensity-aware, screen-space rendering.

tasks.desc: Island stats dashboard with API and UI panel

summary: Added island stats dashboard: new /api/island/<id>/stats backend endpoint aggregating visit_count, guestbook_count, level, xp, objects_placed, terrain_tiles, favorite_count, events_total, coins_earned, achievements_count, age_days from SQLite. Frontend: 📊 button added to topbar (visible to all users), sliding panel from right (320px desktop, bottom sheet on mobile) with styled stat rows, loading state, and smooth CSS transitions. Also added to hamburger menu. Mobile-responsive with bottom-sheet drawer pattern and pull indicator.

tasks.desc: Island mood/status message - owner sets emoji+text via topbar button, visitors see floating pill, lobby cards show mood indicator

summary: Added island mood/status system: new DB columns (island_mood, island_mood_emoji, island_mood_updated) with auto-migration. GET/POST /api/island/mood endpoints. Owner UI: topbar 😊 button opens modal with 10 quick-pick emojis and text input (60 char max), save/clear buttons. Visitor view: floating mood pill near top of island with emoji+text, semi-transparent dark background, subtle pulse animation. Lobby: mood emoji+truncated text shown on island cards below name.

tasks.desc: Recent visitors panel - floating UI showing last 8 unique visitors with emoji avatars, names, and relative timestamps on island page

summary: Added recent visitors feature: new GET /api/island/<id>/recent-visitors endpoint returning last 8 unique visitors (deduplicated by from_name) with emoji, name, relative time. Frontend: floating bottom-left panel with dark semi-transparent theme, collapsible with localStorage state, auto-refresh every 60s. 2-column grid layout, mobile responsive. Visitor count badge in header.

tasks.desc: Island rating system - visitors rate 1-5 stars, avg displayed on lobby cards and island page widget

summary: Added island rating system: new island_ratings table with UNIQUE(user_id,island_id), POST /api/island/<id>/rate and GET /api/island/<id>/rating endpoints. Frontend: floating rating widget on island page (visitors only) with interactive star hover/click, toast feedback. Lobby cards show gold star + avg rating when rating_count>0. Bulk rating query for lobby efficiency.

tasks.desc: Enhanced lobby cards: type badges, visit counts, ratings, mood emoji, bio snippets, NEW badges for recent islands

summary: Enhanced lobby island cards to display more available API data. Added: island type badge pills (farm/fish/mine/forest with color coding), visit count with eye icon, star rating with average score, mood emoji display, single-line bio snippet with ellipsis, and glowing NEW badge for islands created within 48h. All CSS matches dark theme. Compact layout preserved.

tasks.desc: Visitor-visible achievement trophy case on island page with public API endpoint

summary: Added public achievement showcase: new GET /api/island/<id>/achievements endpoint returns unlocked achievements with emoji, name, desc, and timestamp. Frontend: floating trophy case bar at bottom of island page shows up to 8 achievement emoji badges with hover tooltips (name + description), X/16 progress counter. Hidden when no achievements unlocked. Dark theme, mobile responsive (smaller badges on <500px). Auto-loads 2s after island init for all viewers.

tasks.desc: Quick emoji reactions for island visitors - tap to react with floating animation + persisted counts

summary: Added emoji reactions system for island pages. Backend: new island_reactions table with UNIQUE(world_id,user_id,emoji), GET/POST /api/island/<id>/reactions endpoints with toggle behavior and IP-based rate limiting. Frontend: floating reaction bar (6 emojis: ❤️🔥⭐😍🎉👏) positioned bottom-right on island pages, shows counts, highlighted borders for user reactions, floating animation on click. Mobile responsive. Read-only for island owners.

tasks.desc: Daily challenges system - 3 rotating tasks per day with coin rewards

summary: Added daily challenges system. Backend: new daily_challenges table, get_daily_challenges() generates 3 deterministic challenges per day from 8 types (harvest, place, visit, earn_coins, catch_fish, guestbook, upgrade, collect_event) using date-based hash. update_challenge_progress() tracks increments and auto-awards coins via earn_coins(). API: GET /api/daily-challenges returns today's 3 challenges with progress, POST /api/daily-challenges/check for manual refresh. Progress hooks added to visit and object placement endpoints. Frontend: collapsible 📋 challenges panel on island page (owner view) showing emoji, description, progress bar, reward, completion status. Dark translucent style matching existing UI.

tasks.desc: Crafting system - 8 recipes to combine objects into rare decorations

summary: Added crafting system. Backend: CRAFTING_RECIPES with 8 recipes (Golden Tree, Enchanted Well, Grand Lighthouse, Zen Garden, Robot Workshop, Fairy Cottage, Crystal Fountain, Pirate Dock). Each recipe requires 2 ingredients (placed island objects) + coin cost. GET /api/crafting/recipes returns all recipes with can_craft status checking island objects and coins. POST /api/crafting/craft removes ingredient objects, places crafted result at first ingredient position, deducts coins, records activity. Frontend: collapsible Crafting panel on island page (owner view) with recipe list showing ingredient availability checkmarks, coin costs, and Craft button. 8 new crafted-category objects added to catalog.

tasks.desc: Collection Book - discover and track objects by category with milestones and coin rewards

summary: Added Collection Book feature. Backend: collection_book table with UNIQUE(world_id, object_id). discover_object() called on every placement (api_place, ranch_place, gather_place, defense_place). GET /api/collection returns per-category breakdown (13 categories, 105 standard objects) with discovered/total counts, completion %, and 5 milestones (10/25/50/75/100 objects). POST /api/collection/claim-milestone awards coins (50-1500) and records via achievements_v2. Auto-backfill from DB worlds on startup. Frontend: collapsible Collection Book panel in owner view with overall progress bar, per-category mini bars, expandable object lists (✅ discovered vs ❓ undiscovered), and milestone claim buttons.

tasks.desc: Island Favorites / Follow system - server-side API + lobby section + island follow button

summary: Upgraded Island Favorites from localStorage-only to server-side persistence. Backend: favorites table with toggle API (POST /api/favorites/toggle), list API (GET /api/favorites), per-island favorite-count endpoint (GET /api/island/<id>/favorite-count). Islands list API now includes favorited boolean for authenticated users. Frontend island page: Follow/Following button (☆/⭐) with follower count, optimistic UI with localStorage fallback for anonymous users. Frontend lobby: My Favorites section renamed with count, show-more button (max 6 initially), server-synced favorite state loaded in parallel with islands. Cards show ⭐ favorite count when >0. Dual-path: logged-in users use server API, anonymous users fall back to localStorage.

tasks.desc: Fishing mini-game with 12 fish types, 4 rarities, interactive mechanics

summary: Added fishing mini-game to island pages. Backend: 3 API endpoints (cast/reel/catches), fishing_catches SQLite table, 12 fish types across 4 rarity tiers (common/uncommon/rare/legendary) with weighted random selection, server-side session validation with 0.8s catch window, rate limiting (1 cast/5s), coin rewards via earn_coins(), quest integration (advance_quest fish), activity feed events for catches. Frontend: slide-out panel (340px) with animated ocean scene (CSS waves, bobber, fishing rod), 4 game states (idle→casting→waiting→bite→result), success celebration with sparkle particles, recent catches log, rarity-colored results. Accessible to both owners and visitors via topbar button + more menu.

tasks.desc: Dynamic weather system with 6 types, visual effects, fishing integration

summary: Added dynamic weather system. Backend: deterministic weather per island (hash of world_id + 30min time slot), 6 weather types (sunny 40%, cloudy 20%, rainy 15%, stormy 10%, foggy 10%, snowy 5%), weather API endpoint + 3-period forecast for owners, fishing integration (rainy=+20% rare, stormy=+50% rare w/ line break risk, snowy=unique ice fish), sunny=+10% coin bonus. Frontend: weather widget in topbar with icon+name, click for detail popup (description, active effects, countdown), CSS weather overlays (rain drops, snowflakes, storm flash, fog gradient), toggle button to disable effects, auto-refresh every 60s. Bonus: Lobster Talk system with weather-aware messages.

tasks.desc: Treasure hunt mini-game with hourly spawning treasures

summary: Added treasure hunt system. Backend: deterministic treasure spawning per island based on hash(world_id+hour_slot), 1-3 treasures per hour based on island level, 5 treasure types (Gold Coin 50%, Gem 20%, Ancient Scroll 15%, Mystery Key 10%, Crown Fragment 5%), collect API with rate limiting (5/visitor/hour), coin rewards, collection book integration. Frontend: glowing animated treasure spots on island page with pulse/shimmer CSS animations, tap-to-collect with sparkle reward popup, treasure counter in topbar (pirate flag X/Y badge), found treasures shown as faded with checkmark. New treasure_finds DB table.

tasks.desc: Daily quest system with coin rewards

summary: Added daily quest system. Backend: deterministic quest generation per island per day (hash-seeded from world_id+date), 5 quest types (fish/treasure/visit/guestbook/gift), quest_progress tracking table per user IP, claim API with coin rewards via earn_coins(). Hooks into existing features: fishing catch, treasure collect, visit tracking, guestbook post, gift send — all increment quest progress. Frontend: 📜 quest button in island topbar with completion badge, sliding quest panel with progress bars, claim buttons with coin reward popups, auto-refresh on panel open. New DB tables: daily_quests, quest_progress.

tasks.desc: Visitor achievements system with 14 cross-island achievements

summary: Added visitor achievements system. Backend: 14 achievements across 8 stat categories (explorer/social/fishing/treasure/quest/reaction/gift/coins). New DB tables: visitor_achievements, visitor_stats, visitor_island_visits with UNIQUE constraints. Hooks into island visit (unique tracking), guestbook POST, fishing reel, treasure collect, quest claim, reaction toggle, gift send. Achievement check runs after each stat increment, returns newly unlocked in API responses. Frontend: 🏆 button in topbar (logged-in only), sliding achievement panel with gold-themed glassmorphism, progress bars for locked achievements, unlock dates for earned ones, golden toast popup with glow animation for new unlocks, fetch interceptor for auto-detecting new_achievements from any endpoint.

tasks.desc: Visitor profile panel with unified stats dashboard

summary: Added visitor profile panel. Backend: new /api/visitor/profile endpoint returning all visitor stats, achievement count/total, list of visited islands (joined with worlds table), computed visitor level (based on total activity across all stats), fun titles (Wandering Crab → Island Legend), total activity sum, and approximate join date. Frontend: 👤 topbar button (shown when logged in, alongside 🏆), sliding glassmorphism panel (340px, full-width on mobile) with visitor name/level/title header, 2-column stats grid (islands/messages/fish/treasures/quests/reactions/gifts/coins), achievement progress bar (X/14), recently visited islands as mini clickable cards, close on × or outside click.

tasks.desc: Tide Bottle Messages — cross-island message-in-a-bottle system

summary: Added Tide Bottle Messages: visitors can write short messages (140 chars), seal in a bottle, cast into the sea. Bottles randomly wash up on other islands (10% chance per beach check, rate-limited 1 per island per 5 min). Other visitors discover and open bottles for 3 coin reward. Backend: tide_bottles table, 4 API endpoints (send/beach/find/sent), DB helpers with rate limiting and random delivery. Frontend: 🍾 button in visitor topbar, tabbed glassmorphism panel (Send/Beach/My Bottles), bobbing bottle beach indicator animation for unfound bottles, ocean/teal theme. Visitor stat tracking for bottles_sent.

tasks.desc: Island Events system — 5 timed event types with bonus rewards

summary: Added Island Events system. Backend: island_events DB table, deterministic hash-based event spawning (~30% chance per island per hour), 5 event types (Fishing Frenzy 2x catch/10min, Treasure Rain extra spawns/8min, Golden Hour 2x coins/15min, Visitor Festival +2 coins per guestbook/12min, Mystery Fog 1.5x all/10min). DB helpers: init_island_events_table, check_and_spawn_event, get_active_event, get_event_history, increment_event_participants. API: GET /api/island/<id>/events (active event + next countdown), GET /api/island/<id>/events/history (last 10). Frontend: animated event banner on island page below topbar with event-type colored gradient (blue/cyan, purple/gold, gold/amber, pink/magenta, gray/silver), emoji + name + Active! + mm:ss countdown timer (updates every 1s), auto-fade and re-check on expiry, glassmorphism styling, mobile responsive.

tasks.desc: Island Favorites — favorite/unfavorite islands with heart button, lobby favorite counts, My Favorites filter

summary: Added Island Favorites system. Backend: island_favorites DB table with indexes, toggle_favorite, get_favorites_for_user, get_favorite_count, get_favorite_counts_bulk, is_favorited, get_user_favorites. API: POST /api/island/<id>/favorite (toggle), GET /api/island/<id>/favorite (status+count), GET /api/favorites (user list), POST /api/favorites/toggle (body-based), GET /api/island/<id>/favorite-count. Lobby: favorite_count + favorited fields in /api/islands response, heart icon with count on each island card, My Favorites filter tab for logged-in users. Island page: heart toggle button in topbar with animated pulse on click, count display. All endpoints require auth except count reads.

tasks.desc: Per-Island Live Presence — who's here indicator with names/avatars, per-island visitor tracking, lobby active visitors badges

summary: Added Per-Island Live Presence system. Backend: modified _active_sessions to track world_id, updated /api/presence/ping to accept world_id, new GET /api/island/<id>/presence returns visitor list with names/avatars/count (max 20, 60s TTL), added active_visitors field to /api/islands lobby response. Island page: floating "Who's Here" pill (top-right, z:80) with visitor count, click to expand dropdown showing visitor names/avatars, polls every 15s, auto-hides when count=0. Lobby: green pulsing dot + "N online" badge on cards with active visitors.

tasks.desc: Island Time Capsules — visitors bury messages that unlock after delay (1h/24h/7d)

summary: Added Island Time Capsules system. Backend: time_capsules DB table (id, world_id, author_name, author_id, message, buried_at, unlock_at, opened), POST /api/island/<id>/capsules to bury capsules with delay options (1h/24h/7d), GET /api/island/<id>/capsules returns locked (message hidden) and unlocked capsules with counts. Rate limit: 1 capsule per IP per island per 24h, 200 char max. Frontend: ⏳ button in visitor button bar, slide-in panel with capsule list showing live countdown timers for locked capsules, bury form with delay selector, badge count on button. Creates anticipation and encourages return visits.

tasks.desc: Star ratings & short reviews for islands — visitors rate 1-5 stars, reviews show on island page, avg rating on lobby cards

summary: Added Island Ratings & Reviews system. Backend: island_reviews DB table with upsert (1 per author per island), POST/GET /api/island/<id>/ratings endpoints with 24h rate limiting, bulk average ratings in lobby API. Frontend: ⭐ button in visitor button bar with slide-in panel (gold theme), star selector (1-5), review textarea (200 chars), review list with stars/time-ago, average rating summary. Lobby cards show ★ rating when island has reviews. Badge count on button.

tasks.desc: Island Portal Links — owners place animated portal objects linking to other islands, visitors click to teleport

summary: Added Island Portal Links system. Backend: island_portals DB table (max 3 per island), GET/POST/DELETE /api/island/<id>/portals endpoints with target validation and ownership checks. Frontend: animated swirl portal rendering on canvas (pulsing purple glow, spinning ellipse rings, center sparkle), portal click detection for mouse and touch, confirm dialog overlay, owner management slide-in panel with island datalist selector, create/delete portals. Portal labels and target names displayed on canvas.

tasks.desc: Island Ambient Creatures — cute roaming NPC creatures per biome type

summary: Added ambient creature system. Frontend-only. Creatures vary by island type: farm (chickens/butterflies/bees), fish (crabs/hermit crabs/seagulls), mine (lizards/eagles/beetles), forest (squirrels/deer/birds). 4-6 creatures spawn per island, wander autonomously with smooth movement, bobbing animation, flying creatures float higher. Shadow rendering, emoji-based (no new assets). Initializes on island type data load.

tasks.desc: Enhanced day/night cycle with smooth transitions, twinkling stars, sun/moon, ambient overlay, fireflies

summary: Replaced the simple 3-state sky system (day/dusk/night booleans) with a continuous atmospheric cycle. Added: getDayPhase() for smooth 0-1 time progression, drawSkyGradient() with interpolated colors between 5 phases, drawEnhancedStars() with 120 individually twinkling stars, drawCelestialBodies() with sun/moon arcing across the sky, drawAmbientOverlay() for subtle terrain tinting, drawFireflies() with 18 floating glowing particles at night. Uses performance.now() for animation. setInterval(requestRender, 100) for smooth updates. All backward-compatible with existing isDay/isDusk references.

tasks.desc: Rare visual weather events (meteor shower, aurora borealis, rainbow, shooting stars) with +5 coin bonus

summary: Added rare weather events system to island canvas. Events: shooting star (15% night, 2s), meteor shower (3% night, 15s with 6-8 streaks), aurora borealis (2% night, 20s with shimmering bands), rainbow (5% day+rain, 30s). Each event awards +5 bonus coins. Smooth fade in/out animations using performance.now(). 60s check interval with 30s cooldown between events. All frontend-only, no backend changes.

tasks.desc: Hidden treasure collectibles for visitors to discover

summary: Added treasure hunt mini-game. Backend: island_treasures DB table with auto-spawn (2-4 per island, hourly rotation), weighted treasure types (shell/gem/chest/coin_bag/star with 5-30 coin rewards), GET treasures endpoint, POST collect with rate limiting (5/hr/IP), treasure-stats endpoint. Frontend: subtle golden sparkle particles at treasure locations (visitors only), click-to-collect with celebration animation and +coins float-up, toast notifications, treasure counter HUD. All API endpoints tested and working.

tasks.desc: Visitor live chat for island pages

summary: Added island live chat system. Backend: island_chat DB table with 10-min auto-expiry, GET/POST endpoints with rate limiting (1 msg/5s/user), lazy expired message cleanup. Frontend: floating 💬 toggle button (visitor-only), compact 250px chat panel with message list, auto-refresh every 8s, mobile responsive. Login required to post, max 100 chars. Tested: GET returns empty array, POST requires auth correctly.

tasks.desc: My Favorites section in lobby panel

summary: Added My Favorites section to lobby. Backend: /api/favorites/details endpoint returns full island data (name, avatar, level, objects) for user favorited islands (max 20). Frontend: collapsible ⭐ My Favorites section at top of Nearby Islands panel with click-to-visit navigation. Auto-refreshes when toggling favorites. Only shows when user is logged in with favorites.

tasks.desc: Follow/unfollow islands with Following feed in lobby

summary: Added Follow Islands social feature. Backend: island_follows table + toggle_follow/get_user_follows/get_follower_count in db.py. API: POST /api/follows/toggle, GET /api/follows, GET /api/follows/details (full island data), GET /api/follows/count/<id>. Frontend: Follow/Unfollow button on island page (visible to logged-in non-owners), follower count display. Lobby: collapsible Following section with island cards, auto-refresh on toggle. Completes ISSUE-006 social features sub-task.

tasks.desc: Add Top Rated sort option to lobby island list

summary: Added Top Rated sort to lobby. Backend: new rated sort in db.list_worlds joining island_reviews for avg rating + count. API: sort=rated parameter accepted. Frontend: ⭐ Top Rated button in sort controls alongside Popular and Recent. Islands sorted by average review rating desc, then review count, then visits as tiebreaker.

tasks.desc: Add server-side search and type filter to /api/islands endpoint

summary: Added server-side search and type filter to lobby API. Backend: db.list_worlds() now accepts search (LIKE on name) and island_type params with cache key updates. API: /api/islands accepts ?search=X&type=Y, returns total_count. Limit increases to 100 when filters active. Frontend: lobby search input now debounced 300ms calling server-side, type buttons trigger API reload instead of client filter. Favorites still client-side.

tasks.desc: Add sort-by-level option to lobby - backend sort order + frontend button + API allowlist fix

summary: Added 4th sort option to lobby: Sort by Level. Backend: added level sort to ALLOWED_SORT_ORDERS in db.list_worlds() (COALESCE(p.level,1) DESC, visit_count DESC) and added level to API allowlist in api_islands_list(). Frontend: added 🏆 Level sort button to filter bar, added level+rated labels to mobile filter label function. High-level islands (most developed, most content) now surface first when sorting by level.

tasks.desc: Add island favorites/bookmarks

summary: Added client-side favorites system. Lobby: heart toggle button on each island card (top-right, pink when favorited), Favorites filter button in sort/filter bar, empty state message when no favorites. Island page: heart toggle in topbar. All stored in localStorage (clawverse_favorites). No backend changes needed.

tasks.desc: Add public island activity feed for visitors

summary: Added public activity feed to island page. New API endpoint /api/island/<id>/activity-feed with 30s cache, filtering to interesting events (harvests, steals, level-ups, gifts, ranch). Collapsible panel with relative timestamps, auto-refresh every 60s, hidden for owners (they have farm feed). Topbar button for visitors.

tasks.desc: Add trending sort to lobby (visits in last 24h)

summary: Added 5th sort option Trending to lobby. Backend: new trending sort in db.list_worlds() using LEFT JOIN on page_views with 24h window, COALESCE for recent_visits column. Frontend: new Trending button (📈) as first sort option in lobby filter bar, updated mobile filter label mapping and i18n translations for 7 languages.

tasks.desc: Pre-generate thumbnails on save + startup warmup

summary: Fixed ISSUE-007 performance: thumbnails now pre-generated on world save via _regenerate_thumbnail() instead of on-demand. Added startup warmup thread that pre-generates missing/stale thumbnails for all islands. Cache TTL increased 1h→24h. Lobby load no longer triggers cold thumbnail generation.

tasks.desc: Gzip response compression + ETag caching for world data

summary: Added gzip middleware (compresses all JSON/text >500B, level 6) and ETag caching on world endpoint. Lobby: 17.6KB→3.2KB (82%). Largest world: 65.8KB→7.3KB (89%). ETag returns 304 on unchanged worlds. No new deps.

tasks.desc: Add robots.txt + dynamic sitemap.xml for SEO

summary: Added GET /robots.txt (allows all crawlers, links sitemap) and GET /sitemap.xml (dynamic XML sitemap with lobby+map+36 islands, lastmod dates, 1hr cache). 38 URLs indexed. No new deps.

tasks.desc: Server-side Recently Visited Islands with lobby UI

summary: Added visited_at column to visitor_island_visits table, updated track_visitor_island_visit() to record timestamps on repeat visits, added get_recently_visited() DB function, new GET /api/me/recently-visited endpoint returning 8 most recent islands, and upgraded lobby Recently Visited section to fetch from server API for logged-in users (cross-device sync) with localStorage fallback for anonymous visitors.

tasks.desc: Fix XSS in visit tracking + add Recent Visitors panel for island owners

summary: Security: html.escape() on emoji/from_name/message in api_visit() and social_leave_mark(), limit field lengths, escape output in recent-visitors API, use textContent in frontend. Feature: Added owner-only Recent Visitors panel (👥 button in topbar) with sliding panel showing last 8 unique visitors, total count, mobile-responsive bottom sheet.

tasks.desc: Add Island of the Day feature — daily rotating featured island on lobby

summary: Feature: Island of the Day — daily rotating featured island spotlight on lobby. Backend: /api/island-of-the-day with deterministic md5(date)-based selection, 1h cache, eligibility filter (level>=2, visits>=3). Frontend: gold-themed card with thumbnail, bio, stats, Visit button above island grid. XSS-safe. Mobile responsive with vertical layout.

tasks.desc: Custom welcome message for island owners

summary: Feature: Custom Welcome Message — owners can set a personalized greeting (max 120 chars) via "✉️ Welcome Message" in the More menu. Message shown in italic in the visitor welcome card instead of generic "Welcome, explorer!". Backend: /api/island/welcome-message GET/POST with DB migration (welcome_message column). welcome_message included in /api/islands and /api/island-of-the-day responses. Frontend: modal with textarea, char counter, save/clear/cancel. XSS-safe via .textContent.

tasks.desc: Island Tags — owners can add up to 3 tags, lobby displays and filters by tags

summary: Feature: Island Tags — owners can set up to 3 tags (lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens, max 20 chars each) via the More menu Tag Editor. Tags displayed as clickable pills on lobby island cards and on island pages. Lobby features a Popular Tags cloud section that shows the most common tags with counts, supporting client-side tag filtering. Backend: DB migration (island_tags column), GET/POST /api/island/tags with owner auth, tags included in /api/islands and /api/island-of-the-day. Frontend: tag editor modal with suggestions (cozy, competitive, pixel-art, etc.), tag pills on cards, tag cloud filter.

tasks.desc: Island Unlisted Mode — owners can toggle island to unlisted so it hides from lobby but remains accessible via direct link

summary: Feature: Island Unlisted Mode — owners toggle visibility via eye button in toolbar. When unlisted, island is filtered from lobby list_worlds query but direct /api/island/<id> access still works. Backend: DB migration (unlisted column on worlds), GET/POST /api/island/unlisted endpoints, lobby query WHERE filter with cache invalidation. Frontend: CSS owner-only button, toggleUnlistedMode() with confirm dialog, visual state (eye vs monkey emoji), toast notifications, init on page load.

tasks.desc: Captain's Log — owner island journal with emoji posts and visitor read view

summary: Feature: Captain's Log — owners can post short updates (max 280 chars) with emoji to their island journal. Slide-in panel (📜 button in owner toolbar) with compose area, emoji picker (6 presets), and chronological entry list. Visitors see read-only feed. Backend: captains_log table with auto-cleanup (50 entry cap), GET/POST/DELETE /api/island/<id>/log endpoints, rate limiting (1 post/2min). Frontend: panel with dark theme, relative timestamps, fade-in animations, delete confirmation for owners.

tasks.desc: Random Island Hop — 🎲 discovery button

summary: Feature: Random Island Hop — added GET /api/random-island endpoint that returns a random populated non-unlisted island. Island page: 🎲 button in nav bar and '🎲 Next' link in visitor info bar for quick island hopping. Lobby: upgraded goRandomIsland() to use server-side API with client-side fallback. Backend query uses json_array_length on objects array to ensure only populated islands are returned.

tasks.desc: Island Passport — visitor stamp collection system

summary: Feature: Island Passport — logged-in users collect stamps when visiting other islands. New island_passport DB table, /api/passport and /api/passport/count endpoints, auto-stamping via pageview endpoint, toast notification on island page for new stamps, collapsible passport section in lobby with golden-themed stamp cards showing island name, level, and visit date.

tasks.desc: Emoji Rain — broadcast reactions via SSE to all island viewers

summary: Feature: Emoji Rain — when a visitor reacts to an island, an SSE event broadcasts to all current viewers, triggering a screen-wide emoji rain animation (12-15 emojis falling with randomized positions, sizes, durations, delays). Added emoji_rain event to _broadcast_world_event in reaction POST handler, CSS animation keyframes, spawnEmojiRain() JS function, and handling in both SSE listeners with world_id filtering.

tasks.desc: Lobby Card Thumbnails — island preview images on main lobby cards

summary: Visual: Lobby Card Thumbnails — added island thumbnail preview images (56x42px, lazy-loaded) to main lobby island cards. Thumbnails load from existing /api/island/<id>/thumbnail endpoint with graceful fallback to emoji avatar on error. Hidden on screens <400px. CSS: .island-card-thumb-wrap wrapper with relative positioning, .island-card-thumb with rounded corners and cover fit, fallback via thumb-fallback class.

tasks.desc: Day/Night Cycle — dynamic sky based on visitor local time with dawn/day/sunset/night phases, twinkling stars, crescent moon, smooth color transitions for all 4 island types

summary: Visual: Day/Night Cycle — island skies now dynamically change based on visitor local time. Dawn (4-7am): pink/orange transition from night to day. Day (7am-5pm): original theme sky. Sunset (5-8pm): warm oranges/purples. Night (10pm-4am): dark sky with 40 twinkling stars, crescent moon with glow, arc paths across sky. Dusk (8-10pm): smooth sunset-to-night transition. All transitions use smoothstep interpolation. Each of 4 island types (farm/fish/mine/forest) has unique dawn, sunset, and night sky palettes plus moon glow colors. Stars pre-computed for performance. Sun position arcs from east (sunrise) to west (sunset) based on time of day. Fixed lerpColor naming conflict with existing function.

tasks.desc: Tag-based search + tag cloud on lobby for better island discoverability

summary: Feature: Tag Search + Tag Cloud — expanded backend search (list_worlds) to match island_tags in addition to name. New get_popular_tags() DB function counts tags across all listed islands. New GET /api/tags/popular endpoint with 60s cache returns top 20 tags. Lobby tag cloud now fetches from API instead of client-side counting, styled with darker bg pills (#tag format), max 12 tags shown, max-height overflow hidden. switchTagFilter() now triggers server-side search via loadIslands() for accurate tag matching. Tag cloud hidden when no tags exist (graceful degradation).

tasks.desc: Show minimap to visitors (not just owners) for better island navigation

summary: Visitor Minimap — minimap now visible to all users, not just island owners. CSS #minimap-wrap set to display:block by default with opacity 0.75 for visitors (0.88 for owners). Added toggle button (🗺️) with localStorage preference persistence. Mobile: 60x60px for visitors, 72x72px for owners. All 6 view-transition display toggles updated to target minimap-wrap. No changes to drawMinimap() rendering or click-to-navigate logic.

tasks.desc: Add share/copy-link button on lobby island cards

summary: Lobby Card Share Button — added 🔗 copy-link button on each island card in the lobby. Button appears on hover (desktop) or always semi-visible (mobile). Clicking copies the island URL to clipboard with visual feedback (green checkmark + toast notification). Includes fallback for older browsers via textarea/execCommand. Positioned top-left of card thumbnail, styled consistently with existing card-fav-btn. CSS: .card-share-btn with opacity transition, .copied state, mobile override for always-visible. JS: copyIslandLink() with navigator.clipboard API + fallback.

tasks.desc: Add /rss.xml RSS 2.0 feed endpoint

summary: RSS Feed — added GET /rss.xml endpoint returning RSS 2.0 XML with up to 20 recent islands. Each item includes title, link, description (bio+type+level+owner), guid, pubDate (RFC 822). Feed cached 5 minutes (dict cache pattern). Added <link rel=alternate> RSS autodiscovery tag in lobby <head>. Added RSS icon link in lobby footer. Uses html.escape for XML safety, email.utils.formatdate for dates.

tasks.desc: Consolidate 4 DB connections into 1 in api_island_world

summary: Performance: api_island_world opened 4 separate db.get_conn() calls to fetch name, accent_color, announcement, unlisted from worlds table. Consolidated into 1 connection with 1 SELECT query fetching all 4 columns. Reduces per-request DB overhead for every island page load. Addresses ISSUE-007 (Performance).

tasks.desc: Client-side island bookmarks with localStorage

summary: Feature: Island Bookmarks — added ☆/★ bookmark toggle button on island page topbar visible to all visitors. Bookmarks stored in localStorage. Added ⭐ Favorites collapsible section in lobby showing bookmarked islands as compact cards with remove button. Gold accent theme. No backend changes needed.

tasks.desc: Photo Mode — hide all UI for clean island screenshots

summary: Feature: Photo Mode — added 📷 button to island topbar that toggles body.photo-mode class, hiding all UI overlays (topbar, HUD, panels, chat, notifications, visitors, etc.) leaving only the pure isometric canvas. Hint text auto-fades after 3s. Exit via click/Esc. Pure frontend, no backend changes.

tasks.desc: Keyboard shortcuts help panel — press ? to see all shortcuts

summary: Feature: Keyboard Shortcuts Help Panel — added ? button to island topbar and ? key listener that opens a beautiful overlay listing all keyboard shortcuts (Navigation: WASD/arrows/zoom/home, Editing: undo/redo/copy/paste, Panels: Esc/FPS counter, Photo Mode). Dark themed card with kbd-styled keys, sections, responsive for mobile. Click overlay or Esc to close. Pure frontend, no backend changes.

tasks.desc: Claws Daily Tips strip on lobby — 20 rotating daily tips from Claw the lobster

summary: Feature: Claws Daily Tips — added a charming tip strip to lobby between quick-nav and island sections. 20 tips rotate daily (UTC-day based), teaching users about hidden features: keyboard shortcuts, photo mode, treasures, quests, portals, bottles, time capsules, guestbook, passport, world map, turnip market, etc. Dark ocean themed with teal accent, Inter font, dismissible (sessionStorage). Fades in on load, smooth dismiss animation. Mobile-responsive (11px, full-width). Pure frontend, no backend changes.

tasks.desc: Claws Fortune Cookie — 🥠 topbar button

summary: Feature: Claws Fortune Cookie — added 🥠 button to island topbar that shows random fortunes from Claw the lobster. 38 curated fortunes across 5 categories: ocean wisdom, island tips, philosophical musings, playful jokes, and motivational quotes. Uses existing speechBubble system for canvas overlay + showToast for text notification. No-repeat logic ensures variety. 10-second cooldown with grayed-out button state. Bounce animation on click. Pure frontend, no backend changes. Visible to all users (visitors + owners).

tasks.desc: Procedural ambient sound system using Web Audio API

summary: Feature: Ambient Sound System — added 🔊 toggle button to island topbar that enables procedural ambient audio using Web Audio API. 4 sound layers: ocean waves (filtered white noise with LFO), wind (bandpass noise), crickets/birds (sine oscillators with randomized timing), and rain (pink noise). All context-aware: volume adjusts based on time of day (getDayPhase), weather (weatherData), and island type. Night has crickets, day has birds, rain/storm boosts rain layer, fishery islands boost ocean. Master volume 0.15 for subtle ambiance. localStorage persistence. No audio files needed — pure synthesis. Pure frontend, no backend changes.

tasks.desc: Tide system for fishing — 6hr sine-wave cycle

summary: Feature: Tide System — added _get_tide_info() helper with 6-hour sine-wave tide cycle (high/low/rising/falling). New /api/tide endpoint. Fishing cast response now includes tide data with fishing_bonus multiplier (1.0-1.3x based on tide phase). Fishing panel shows tide badge with emoji, label, bonus percentage, and animated level bar. Tide auto-fetches on panel open and updates on each cast. High tide gives +30% rarity bonus, rising +15%, falling +10%. Pure gameplay enhancement.

tasks.desc: Shooting Stars — rare night-time celestial events, clickable for coins

summary: Feature: Shooting Stars — rare celestial events that streak across the island sky at night (nightFactor > 0.5). 15% spawn chance per 30s check, scales with night depth. Clickable for 15-50 coin reward with 5min rate limit. CSS animation (translate -80vw, 50vh), star-burst click effect. Backend /api/shooting-star/wish endpoint with rate limiting and SSE broadcast. Toast notifications for spawn and wish result. 2min cooldown between stars. Pure gameplay + visual enhancement.

tasks.desc: Island Critters — animated pixel creatures based on terrain

summary: Feature: Island Critters System — animated creatures that roam islands based on terrain type. 4 critter types: crabs (sand tiles, max 4, sideways scuttle), butterflies (flower objects, max 3, gentle flutter), seagulls (water edges, max 2, circular flight), lizards (rock tiles, max 1, rare quick darts). Backend /api/island/<world_id>/critters endpoint analyzes terrain and returns spawn counts. Frontend CritterSystem class manages spawning, movement patterns, and animations. Critters clickable for fun toast messages. Night awareness: butterflies replaced by fireflies at night. CSS keyframe animations for each type. Max 10 critters per island for performance. 282 lines added.

tasks.desc: Follow/Bookmark UI polish — gold star theme, lobby following section, critter rendering

summary: Feature: Follow/Bookmark UI Polish — Updated follow button to gold star ⭐ theme with warm golden glow. Follow state shows ★ Following with dot-separated follower count. Added styled Following Section to lobby (lobby.html) with horizontal scrollable card row, pixel-art themed cards with thumbnails, owner names, follower/object counts. Integrated evo-246 critter rendering into main render/draw loops. Added island_type to follows API response. 252 lines changed.

tasks.desc: Message in a Bottle — cross-island social feature

summary: Feature: Message in a Bottle — New bottles table in db.py with toss/land/find/stats/rate-limit functions. 4 new API endpoints: POST /api/island/<id>/bottle (toss), GET /api/island/<id>/bottles (landed), POST /api/bottle/<id>/find, GET /api/bottles/stats. Frontend: bobbing 🍾 indicator with badge count, toss modal (name+message, 140 char limit), found bottles display with origin info. Bottles land on random OTHER islands creating cross-island social discovery. Rate limited 1 per island per 10 min. 232 lines changed.

tasks.desc: Island Expeditions — timed idle-game mechanic with 4 destinations and loot system

summary: Feature: Island Expeditions — New expeditions table in db.py with start/check/complete/history/loot-generator functions. 4 destinations: Reef (5-15min, common shells/coral), Deep Sea (15-30min, pearls/rare fish), Shipwreck (30-45min, gold/gems), Volcano (45-60min, fire crystals/dragon scales). 3 API endpoints: POST start expedition (owner-only), GET check status (auto-complete), GET history. Frontend: compass 🧭 button with expedition panel showing destination cards, active countdown timer with progress bar, loot reveal animation. 1 active expedition per island limit. 573 lines changed.

tasks.desc: Fix broken Analytics API — parameterized SQL queries + hourly heatmap

summary: Bugfix: Analytics API was returning 500 — _req_world_id() function call was embedded as literal string in 4 SQL queries instead of parameterized. Fixed all 4 queries to use proper ? placeholders. Enhancement: Added hourly activity heatmap (0-23h bar chart) and object/tile counts to analytics response. Frontend: Added canvas-based hourly heatmap chart with heat coloring to analytics.html. 3 files changed, 115 insertions, 13 deletions.

tasks.desc: Add Surprise Me random island button to lobby + /api/islands/random endpoint

summary: Feature: Surprise Me — New /api/islands/random endpoint picks random populated non-unlisted island. Lobby: golden 🎲 Surprise Me button below type filters with dice shake animation, error toast, mobile-responsive. 2 files changed, 81 insertions.

tasks.desc: Add Fish Collection / Aquarium view to fishing panel with backend endpoint

summary: Feature: Fish Collection — New /api/fishing/collection endpoint returns caught vs all fish species. Frontend: tabbed fishing panel (Fishing | Collection) with 3-column grid, completion progress bar, rarity colors, uncaught silhouettes. 4 files changed, 100 insertions.
